message:
feat(fuzz): phase-2 fuzz targets for resolver, regex, and scanf (bd-1oz.7)

fuzz_resolver: 6-operation DNS fuzzer covering DnsHeader/DnsQuestion/
DnsRecord/DnsMessage encode/decode round-trips, resolv.conf parsing with
arbitrary config text, and domain name encoding invariant checks.

fuzz_regex: 4-operation POSIX regex fuzzer covering Thompson NFA
compilation with all flag combinations (BRE/ERE/ICASE/NEWLINE/NOSUB),
execution with submatch offset validation, known pattern battery for
parser path coverage, and error code mapping exhaustion.

fuzz_scanf: 4-operation scanf fuzzer covering format string parsing with
all directive types (literals/whitespace/specs/scansets), input scanning
with result structure validation, known format battery, and scanset edge
cases (negation, ranges, ] as first char).

All targets use structure-aware fuzzing via arbitrary::Arbitrary with
bounded execution (max input sizes, max iterations). Includes seed corpus
files for initial coverage bootstrapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,4 +33,19 @@ name = "fuzz_printf"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_printf.rs"
 doc = false
 
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_resolver"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_resolver.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_regex"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_regex.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_scanf"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_scanf.rs"
+doc = false
+
 [workspace]
